lines.speaker: Juliet
lines.text: Romeo, Romeo, wherefore art thou Romeo?

lines.speaker: Juliet
lines.text: I sat in that cold crypt for ages waiting for Romeo.

lines.speaker: Juliet
lines.text: That useless fool never showed up.

lines.speaker: Juliet
lines.text: And all I got was indigestion. I am done with men like him.

lines.speaker: Juliet
lines.text: Now go away before I call my father!
